_comment: Species: Cold Dragon (寒龙) from A Will Eternal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Cold Dragon

canonical.appearance: Serpentine dragon 40 m, scales ice-blue, breath freezes spirit
canonical.size: 40 m adult, 80000 jin; ancient 200 m, millions of jin
canonical.behavior: Solitary apex of cold regions; sleeps in glacial depths
canonical.habitat: Glacial seas, ice-aspected apex spirit veins
canonical.relationships: Rival of ice phoenix; kin of flame dragon (opposite attribute)
canonical.bloodline: Cold-Dragon lineage; ice-attribute true dragon bloodline (diluted)
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: cold_dragon — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
